name: home-organization-app
description: The Home Organization App is a full-stack application designed to help users manage their home inventory efficiently. It features a backend built with Express.js and MongoDB, and a frontend developed using React and Tailwind CSS.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.build:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
